whats_included: Full snorkeling equipment (mask, fins, life vest)
Tea & coffee at Serangan office before departure
not_included: Alcoholic beverages (available to purchase on board)

cancellation_policy.24h_plus: Full refund if cancelled 24+ hours before tour start
cancellation_policy.within_24h: No refund for any reason within 24 hours of departure
cancellation_policy.weather_by_operator: Full refund OR free reschedule if WE cancel due to weather
cancellation_policy.note: Refunds processed minus payment platform fees where applicable

transfer_logistics.driver_contact: Driver contacts guest via WhatsApp by 21:00 the evening before
transfer_logistics.if_no_contact: If no WhatsApp from driver by 21:00 — contact us immediately
transfer_logistics.areas_covered: Seminyak, Kuta, Legian, Canggu, Ubud, Nusa Dua, Jimbaran, Sanur, Uluwatu and more

dietary.how_to_request: Mention dietary requirement at time of booking or message us before the tour
dietary.on_board: Snacks, cold beverages, and beers available for purchase

boat_types.shared_standard: Up to 13 guests per boat, affordable, same experience
boat_types.shared_premium: Smaller group, bigger boat, more comfort
boat_types.private_charter: Entire boat for your group, custom itinerary, 2-25+ guests

what_to_bring: Cash IDR (for optional extras on board)
NO passport required for Nusa Penida day tours

manta_rays.frequency: Very high — one of the best manta ray spots in the world
manta_rays.guarantee: Cannot be 100% guaranteed as wildlife, but sightings are very common
manta_rays.alternative: If mantas not present, guides explore nearby alternative spots

children.note: Inform us at booking if bringing babies or very young children

sea_sickness.advice: Take motion sickness tablets 30-60 minutes before boarding if prone
sea_sickness.sea_conditions: We monitor conditions — rough weather = cancellation
sea_sickness.brands: Antimo or Dramamine tablets widely available in Bali pharmacies
